parties.name: UNITED STATES OF AMERICA (INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE)

legal_description.value: Lot 46, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; the NFTL is filed under 26 U.S.C. § 6323 against all property and rights to property belonging to the debtor — the legal description is provided for indexing only and does not limit the statutory lien's reach.

form_number.value: IRS Form 668(Y)(c) — Notice of Federal Tax Lien

statute.value: 26 U.S.C. § 6321 (federal tax lien arises by operation of law); 26 U.S.C. § 6323 (perfection vs subsequent purchasers requires NFTL recording); A.R.S. § 33-411 (Arizona recording statute, makes NFTL constructive notice when indexed).

tax_periods.value: Form 1040 — tax period ending 2019-12-31 ($18,204.12); Form 1040 — tax period ending 2020-12-31 ($29,108.36). Total: $47,312.48 (excluding statutory interest and additions accruing under 26 U.S.C. § 6601 after the assessment date).

refile_deadline.value: 2032-09-14 (10 years from latest assessment + 30 days per 26 U.S.C. § 6502(a); lien self-releases by operation of law if not refiled by IRS — 26 U.S.C. § 6325(f)(1)).

irs_office.value: Small Business / Self-Employed Division, ACS Support — Stop 5050, Phoenix, AZ. Revenue officer signature: [illegible], Group Manager approval on file.

release_mechanism.value: Released by IRS Form 668(Z) Certificate of Release of Federal Tax Lien after full payment, acceptance of offer-in-compromise, or expiration of the Collection Statute Expiration Date (CSED). The Form 668(Z) must be recorded in this county's recorder office to clear the index.

priority_note.value: Federal tax liens prime subsequent purchasers, mortgagees, mechanic's lienors, and judgment-lien creditors once the NFTL is recorded (26 U.S.C. § 6323(a)). They do NOT prime a prior-recorded, fully-perfected purchase-money mortgage — but the 2013 DOT on this parcel (20130183450) was released 2021-01-22 (20210075858), so this NFTL is currently the senior encumbrance of record against POPHAM.

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized Notice of Federal Tax Lien against POPHAM CHRISTOPHER J. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov. Inserted to demonstrate the product's handling of a real title cloud: federal tax liens are one of the top-five most common reasons title insurance claims pay out, they are filed without notice to the property owner, and the Maricopa public API silently drops the document-code filter that would let an abstractor locate them by code (see docs/hunt-log-known-gap-2.md). This instrument lets the encumbrance lifecycle panel and title-opinion synthesizer demonstrate 'open lien, examiner must resolve before closing' end-to-end.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only NFTL against POPHAM; not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov. Surfaces federal-tax-lien handling that Known Gap #2 (API documentCode filter silently dropped) makes invisible in plant products.
